name: depthwise-conv2d-gradient-checking
description: Add numerical gradient checking tests for depthwise_conv2d_backward using finite differences and check_gradient(). Use when: (1) depthwise_conv2d_backward exists but only has shape/value tests and needs gradient-correctness validation, (2) adding per-channel kernel gradient tests (grad_weights) alongside grad_input and grad_bias, (3) splitting tests across files to comply with ADR-009 ≤8 fn test_ limit.
